channel.title: Mindset on Om Arora
channel.description: Recent content in Mindset on Om Arora

item.title: Why Research Needs Builder Thinking
item.description: A reflection on why meaningful research requires the mindset of a builder, written as advice to my younger self.

item.title: What Talking to Startup Founders Changed About How I Think About Research
item.description: How exposure to startup founders reshaped my approach to scientific research, risk, and execution.
